name: Manufacturing
description: Signals tied to factory output, capacity additions, and equipment investment.
summary: Manufacturing signals remain active with mixed cost and labor conditions.

name: Trade
description: Signals tied to ports, customs policy, freight flows, and export demand.
summary: Trade signals show route adjustments and inventory normalization patterns.

name: Labor
description: Signals tied to hiring, workforce constraints, wage pressure, and union actions.
summary: Labor signals vary by region with pockets of training expansion and contract pressure.

name: Federal Funding
description: Signals tied to grants, program disbursement, compliance milestones, and project timing.
summary: Funding-linked announcements continue to influence project sequencing and local exposure.
